docs.text: Hi welcome to my simple blog. It is not fancy but it does the work
docs.title: Ssali Jonathan

docs.text: Pure Python Web Applications with Reflex
docs.title: Posts

docs.text: 28th January, 2025 Introduction I am thrilled to share something special with you all! I had the incredible opportunity to speak at PyCon Uganda about one of my favorite topics: Reflex , a powerful framework for full-stack Python web development. Conclusion My talk, titled Full-Stack Python Web Development: Introducing Reflex , was an amazing experience. I will be honest. I was pretty nervous stepping onto that stage, but I gave it my all, and I’m so proud of how it turned out. In this talk, I dived into how Reflex simplifies building modern web applications using Python alone, and why I think it is a game-changer for developers. Check it out On Youtube : Full-Stack Python Web Development: Introducing Reflex
